title: Ankai Fort
tagline: Ankai Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Ankai Fort is a historic site found in the Satmala Range hills in western India.
overview.description: Ankai Fort is a historic site found in the Satmala Range hills in western India. It is located in Yeola Taluka of Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra. The fort was built by Yadava of Devgiri. Geographically, it is near Manmad.

topPlaces.name: Tankai fort
topPlaces.description: Tankai fort is a hill, part of the Satmala Range, with the ruins of a large Maratha hill fort on the peak. With Ankai Fort near this fort are known as Ankai-Tankai, the strongest hill fort in the Nashik district, rises about 900 feet above the plain and 3200 feet above the sea.

topPlaces.name: Manmad
topPlaces.description: Manmad ( [mənmaːɖ]) is a town in Nandgaon tehsil, Nashik district in Maharashtra, India. It is the third largest city in the district, with a population of 80,058 As of 2011.

items.note: Tankai fort is a hill, part of the Satmala Range, with the ruins of a large Maratha hill fort on the peak. With Ankai Fort near this fort are known as Ankai-Tankai, the strongest hill fort in the Nashik district, rises about 900 feet above the plain and 3200 feet above the sea.
Manmad ( [mənmaːɖ]) is a town in Nandgaon tehsil, Nashik district in Maharashtra, India. It is the third largest city in the district, with a population of 80,058 As of 2011.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ankai Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ankai Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ankai Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (56 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ankai Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ankai Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ankai Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Ankai Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ankai Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tankai fort, Manmad.
